Common.missingYearDescription: Only the next available exercise can be created to keep the balance chain connected.
Common.nextStepDescription: Initialize {nextCreatableYear} to open the monthly overview and complete the planning.
Common.logout_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access your data.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
Settings.deleteAccountDialogDescription: This will delete your user, Google access, and all exercises, months, and entries. You will not be able to recover this data.
Settings.deleteAccountSecondDescription: To confirm that you want to permanently delete the account, type {phrase}.
Settings.deleteAccountError: Could not delete the account. Check the connection and try again.

Annual.title: Annual Summary
Annual.configDescription: Adjust the base values for the year. Changes apply to the forecast and export.
Annual.description: Review the expected closing balance, accumulated savings, and monthly trend for the year.
Annual.exportDescription: Export the full year in Excel with the latest configuration.
Annual.savingDescription: Configuration changes are being saved before launching year actions.

kpis.totalSavingsNote: Net savings generated during the year
kpis.bestMonthNote: Highest savings recorded in one month
kpis.estimatedBalanceNote: Expected balance at the end of December
kpis.activeMonths: {count, plural, one {# active month} other {# active months}}
kpis.investmentMonths: {count, plural, one {# month invested} other {# months invested}}

config.startingBalanceDescription: Automatically updated with the projected closure of the previous exercise.
config.startingBalanceEditableDescription: You can adjust it manually because it is the first available exercise in your account.
config.hasExtraPaymentsDescription: Adds a fixed extra pay in June and December.
config.estimatedExtraPayment: Estimated amount for each extra pay
config.recurringExpensesDescription: Monthly template that will be applied to every month in the year.
config.recurringExpensesConfirmDescription: Recurring expenses from {month} through December will be replaced. Manual changes inside those months will be lost.
config.confirmOverwriteDescription: This change will update months from {month} through December from the annual setup and overwrite manually edited fixed values.
config.applyFromMonthDescription: Monthly setup values and recurring expenses are only reapplied from this month through December.
config.sectionStartingPointDescription: Defines the balance that starts the annual chain.
config.sectionIncomeDescription: Configure base salary and the June and December extra pays.
config.sectionMonthlyAllocationDescription: Groups the fixed amounts repeated every month.
config.sectionGrowthDescription: Controls the annual return used to project interest.

Setup.title: Configure {year}
Setup.subtitle: Financial year kickoff
Setup.descriptionEditable: These values will create the 12 months of the year. You can adjust any month later.
Setup.descriptionFixed: Gridly will use the projected close of {previousYear} as the starting balance for {year}.
Setup.formDescriptionEditable: Enter the financial baseline before generating the months.

startingPoint.title: Starting point

income.title: Income

recurringExpenses.title: Recurring expenses

summary.extraPaysDisabled: No extra pays will be created

Setup.recurringExpensesDescription: Add expenses that you want to copy automatically into each month.

monthly.title: Recurring expenses
monthly.description: Planned expenses that repeat every month. Changes here only affect this month.

Landing.heroTitle: Plan your financial year month by month.
Landing.heroDescription: Gridly connects income, expenses, savings, and starting balance into a clear annual chain, with extra pay periods, year summary, and Excel export.
Landing.accountDeletedDescription: Your account and data have been deleted successfully.
Landing.authErrorDescription: You are not signed in. You can try again whenever you want.

primaryProof.extraPays: Extra pay in June and December

monthly.title: Month by month
monthly.description: Track income, fixed expenses, and additional entries with quick editing.

chain.title: Connected balance
chain.description: Each monthly close automatically feeds the next month starting balance.

annual.title: Annual close
annual.description: Review charts, extra pay periods, and export the full year to Excel.

annualStory.title: Every month moves the year-end picture.
annualStory.description: Starting balance, income, expenses, and monthly savings are chained together so you can see how the full year evolves.

preview.title: Preview
preview.connectedBalance: Balance connected with the previous close

overview.additionalIncomeDescription: Extraordinary income that improves the final balance.
overview.noAdditionalIncome: There is no additional income yet. Add one if applicable.
